case_title: SHING KIT LEE VS. GORDON CHENG et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, GORDON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, GORDON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT SERVED MAY-03-2007, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (AMENDED) AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, GORDON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SHING KIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENG, GORDON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 11 BELDEN PLACE, APARTMENT NO. 403, SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94104, THIS JUDGMENT INCLUDES RECOVERY POSSESSION FROM ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
